seoTitle: Duval County Public Schools Calendar 2025-2026: Official Online Dates
seoDescription: Duval County Public Schools 2025-2026 official online calendar with Aug 11 first day, May 28 last day, holidays, breaks, planning days and ICS.
calendarNotes: Duval County Public Schools publishes the 2025-2026 calendar as an official online calendar page rather than a downloadable PDF on the supplied source. The school year starts August 11, 2025 and ends May 28, 2026. Thanksgiving Break runs November 26-28, Winter Break runs December 22-January 2, and Spring Break runs March 16-20. The calendar also lists weather days, planning days, teacher workdays, and grading-period dates.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Duval County start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: Duval County Public Schools starts the 2025-2026 school year on Monday, August 11, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Duval County Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 16 through Friday, March 20, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Duval County in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Thursday, May 28, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: Why is there no PDF link for the Duval 2025-2026 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: The supplied official Duval source is an online calendar page. This page links that official calendar page instead of listing a PDF download.

yearNumbers.label: Official Source
yearNumbers.detail: The 2025-2026 source is an official Duval webpage rather than a PDF download.

yearNumbers.label: Weather Days
yearNumbers.detail: The calendar lists November 10, April 6, May 29, and June 1-2 as weather day windows.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Duval's spring break runs Monday through Friday in mid-March.
